subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Ḥusayn! Thou hast ever been and art remembered. Grieve not at that which hath befallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین لازال مذکور بوده و هستی از آنچه وارد شده محزون مباش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
